creator: mshirk@daemon-security.com
text:
Created attachment 206025
py-zkg.diff

New update for py-zkg, svn diff attached.

Index: Makefile
===================================================================
--- Makefile    (revision 507259)
+++ Makefile    (working copy)
@@ -2,7 +2,7 @@

 PORTNAME=      zkg
 DISTVERSIONPREFIX=     v
-DISTVERSION=   2.0.0
+DISTVERSION=   2.0.2
 CATEGORIES=    security python
 PKGNAMEPREFIX= ${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}
